answer: Pacific-region gold loyalty mobile web checkout conversion dropped on August 4, 2026 because variant B of exp-2026-q3-loyalty-wallet-accelerator wrote wallet eligibility by household_id, causing the wallet eligibility cache to reuse linked-profile state and mark eligible loyalty shoppers ineligible. Remediation was to disable variant B, purge wallet_eligibility_cache, and rebuild allocation by customer_profile_id.

facts.remediation: Disable variant B, purge wallet_eligibility_cache, and rebuild allocation by customer_profile_id.
facts.root_cause: Loyalty wallet eligibility cache reused household_id across linked profiles, causing eligible Pacific gold loyalty mobile-web profiles to be marked ineligible.
